ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "fipscode" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county (population per square mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "minority" REAL /* Percentage of minority population */,
  "female" REAL /* Percentage of female population */,
  "unemployed" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median income */,
  "nodegree" REAL /* Percentage of population with no degree */,
  "bachelor" REAL /* Percentage of population with a bachelor's degree */,
  "inactivity" REAL /* Percentage of population with inactivity */,
  "obesity" REAL /* Percentage of population with obesity */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Race distribution of the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "marriage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is married */,
  "divorce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is divorced */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "health_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the health metric data belongs to */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density */,
  "cancer" REAL /* Cancer rate */,
  "votergap" REAL /* Voter gap */,
  "trump" REAL /* Trump votes */,
  "clinton" REAL /* Clinton votes */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in years */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adult population that smokes */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Average alcohol consumption per capita */,
  "physical_activity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population that engages in regular physical activity */,
  "mental_health_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of population with mental health issues */,
  "hospital_beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1,000 population */,
  "physicians_per_1000" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1,000 population */,
  "emergency_room_visits" REAL /* Number of emergency room visits per 1,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., demographics, health_metrics) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific data record accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("health_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)
